results.text:
Viral on X? Here’s the Ugly Playbook 🧐

Fake job listings.
Fake PnL screenshots.
Fake giveaways.
Fake “Web3 hiring” posts.
Ragebait for engagement.
Fake partnerships.
Even fake birthdays.

It works… until it doesn’t.

Real builders don’t chase engagement… they earn trust.

Attention is cheap. Reputation is everything.
